title: spirit haunted place in Fanny Balbuk spirit-haunted place context
publication_or_organisation: Restricted Rights and Freedoms: Fanny Balbuk Yooreel; ABC Education
australian_relation: ABC Education public transcript about Fanny Balbuk Yooreel that preserves source-grounded discourse about spirit-haunted places and spirit baby stones in Perth Noongar country.
evidence_summary: ABC Education's Fanny Balbuk Yooreel transcript says every magic spot, every spirit haunted place, and every spirit baby stone, rock, or cave were known to Balbuk, and that her knowledge of her tribe's folklore was intimate and extensive.
